debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
ha : 0 < a
hb : 0 < b
⊢ 0 ∉ uIcc a b

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simpa [uIcc_of_le hab] using h0
      have hle : a ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ b := by simpa [Set.mem_Icc] using hmem
      exact ha.ne' (le_antisymm (le_trans ha.le hle.1) (le_trans hle.1 ha.le))
    · have hab' : b ≤ a := le_of_not_ge hab
      have ha0 : a ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt ha
      have hb0 : b ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hb
      intro h0
      have hmem : (0:ℝ) ∈ Set.uIcc a b := by simpa [uIcc_of_ge hab'] using h0
      have hle : b ≤ 0 ∧ 0 ≤ a := by simpa [Set.mem_Icc] using hmem
      exact hb.ne' (le_antisymm (le_trans hb.le hle.1) (le_trans hle.1 hb.le))
